"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as ToastPrimitives from "@radix-ui/react-toast"
import { type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { X } from "lucide-react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const ToastProvider = ToastPrimitives.Provider


const toastViewportToastPrimitivesViewport = tw.style({
    position: "fixed",
    top: "top-0",
    zIndex: "z-[100]",
    display: "flex",
    maxHeight: "max-h-screen",
    width: "w-full",
    flexDirection: "flex-col-reverse",
    padding: "p-4",
    sm: {
        bottom: "sm:bottom-0",
        right: "sm:right-0",
        top: "sm:top-auto",
        flexDirection: "sm:flex-col",
    },
    md: {
        maxWidth: "md:max-w-[420px]",
    },
});

const ToastViewport = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Viewport>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Viewport>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <ToastPrimitives.Viewport
    ref={ref}
    className={toastViewportToastPrimitivesViewport.class(className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
ToastViewport.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Viewport.displayName

const toastVariants = /**
 * @defaultVariants {
      variant: "default",
    }
 */
tw.variants({
    base: {
        pointerEvents: "pointer-events-auto",
        position: "relative",
        display: "flex",
        width: "w-full",
        alignItems: "items-center",
        justifyContent: "justify-between",
        margin: "space-x-2",
        overflow: "overflow-hidden",
        borderRadius: "rounded-md",
        borderWidth: "border",
        padding: ["p-4", "pr-6"],
        boxShadow: "shadow-lg",
        transitionProperty: "transition-all",
        "data-[swipe=cancel]": {
            translate: "data-[swipe=cancel]:translate-x-0",
        },
        "data-[swipe=end]": {
            translate: "data-[swipe=end]:translate-x-[var(--radix-toast-swipe-end-x)]",
        },
        "data-[swipe=move]": {
            translate: "data-[swipe=move]:translate-x-[var(--radix-toast-swipe-move-x)]",
            transitionProperty: "data-[swipe=move]:transition-none",
        },
    },
    variants: {
        variant: {
            default: {
                borderWidth: "border",
                backgroundColor: "bg-background",
                color: "text-foreground",
            },
            destructive: {
                borderWidth: "border-destructive",
                backgroundColor: "bg-destructive",
                color: "text-destructive-foreground",
            },
        },
    },
})

const Toast = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Root>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Root> &
    VariantProps<typeof toastVariants>
>(({ className, variant, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <ToastPrimitives.Root
      ref={ref}
      className={tw.join(toastVariants({ variant }), className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
Toast.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Root.displayName


const toastActionToastPrimitivesAction = tw.style({
    display: "inline-flex",
    height: "h-8",
    flexShrink: "shrink-0",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
    borderRadius: "rounded-md",
    borderWidth: "border",
    backgroundColor: "bg-transparent",
    padding: "px-3",
    fontSize: "text-sm",
    fontWeight: "font-medium",
    transitionProperty: "transition-colors",
    hover: {
        backgroundColor: "hover:bg-secondary",
    },
    focus: {
        outlineStyle: "focus:outline-none",
        boxShadow: ["focus:ring-1", "focus:ring-ring"],
    },
    disabled: {
        pointerEvents: "disabled:pointer-events-none",
        opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
    },
    "group-[.destructive]": {
        borderWidth: "group-[.destructive]:border-muted/40",
        hover: {
            borderWidth: "group-[.destructive]:hover:border-destructive/30",
            backgroundColor: "group-[.destructive]:hover:bg-destructive",
            color: "group-[.destructive]:hover:text-destructive-foreground",
        },
        focus: {
            boxShadow: "group-[.destructive]:focus:ring-destructive",
        },
    },
});

const ToastAction = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Action>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Action>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <ToastPrimitives.Action
    ref={ref}
    className={toastActionToastPrimitivesAction.class(className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
ToastAction.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Action.displayName


const toastCloseToastPrimitivesClose = tw.style({
    position: "absolute",
    right: "right-1",
    top: "top-1",
    borderRadius: "rounded-md",
    padding: "p-1",
    color: "text-foreground/50",
    opacity: "opacity-0",
    transitionProperty: "transition-opacity",
    hover: {
        color: "hover:text-foreground",
    },
    focus: {
        opacity: "focus:opacity-100",
        outlineStyle: "focus:outline-none",
        boxShadow: "focus:ring-1",
    },
    "group-hover": {
        opacity: "group-hover:opacity-100",
    },
    "group-[.destructive]": {
        color: "group-[.destructive]:text-red-300",
        hover: {
            color: "group-[.destructive]:hover:text-red-50",
        },
        focus: {
            boxShadow: ["group-[.destructive]:focus:ring-red-400", "group-[.destructive]:focus:ring-offset-red-600"],
        },
    },
});

const ToastClose = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Close>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Close>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <ToastPrimitives.Close
    ref={ref}
    className={toastCloseToastPrimitivesClose.class(className)}
    toast-close=""
    {...props}
  >
    <X className={tw.join("h-4 w-4")} />
  </ToastPrimitives.Close>
))
ToastClose.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Close.displayName

const ToastTitle = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Title>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Title>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <ToastPrimitives.Title
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join("text-sm font-semibold [&+div]:text-xs", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
ToastTitle.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Title.displayName

const ToastDescription = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Description>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ToastPrimitives.Description>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <ToastPrimitives.Description
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join("text-sm opacity-90", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
ToastDescription.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Description.displayName

type ToastProps = React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof Toast>

type ToastActionElement = React.ReactElement<typeof ToastAction>

export {
  type ToastProps,
  type ToastActionElement,
  ToastProvider,
  ToastViewport,
  Toast,
  ToastTitle,
  ToastDescription,
  ToastClose,
  ToastAction,
}
